notes: Core Tetris mechanics work but the lock delay logic is broken (lockTimer only increments by gravityInt instead of dt, causing inconsistent locking), the soft drop key handling is incomplete, and the HUD/game-over overlay is offset to the left half of the canvas rather than centered over the play field.
Playable basic Tetris with scoring, next piece, ghost piece, and line clears, but it lacks standard features like proper soft drop behavior and robust rotation/spawn handling, so it feels incomplete.
